introduction: Godhani is a locality in eastern Nagpur that offers affordable residential plot options for budget buyers. The area is situated near the Umred Road corridor and has basic social infrastructure in place. As eastern Nagpur continues to develop with improved road connectivity and new township projects, localities like Godhani are expected to see gradual appreciation. For early-mover investors with a medium-term horizon, Godhani presents a low-entry opportunity.
whyInvest: Near Umred Road with improving connectivity
